title: skills:skill-repository-infra
description: Infrastructure implementation of `SkillRepositoryPort` using node:fs for file system operations.
context: Infrastructure implementation of `SkillRepositoryPort` using node:fs for file system operations.

rules: The infrastructure MUST use `node:fs/promises` to read template files from `packages/skills/templates/`.
A `TemplateReader` component MUST read `.md` files from `packages/skills/templates/<skill-name>/` and return them as `SkillTemplate` objects with lazy content loading.

The infrastructure MUST scan `templates/shared/` for `.meta.json` files containing:

```json
{
  "filename": "...",
  "skills": ["skill1", "skill2"]
}
```

Each shared file's content is loaded on demand.
The module MUST export `createSkillRepository(): SkillRepositoryPort` as the main factory function.

constraints: All I/O happens in this infrastructure layer.

scenarios.name: Reads template files
then: template files are read from packages/skills/templates/
